name: Tollara Demo — Subscriber URL Metadata (invoke sync)

parameters.content:
## Subscriber — URL Metadata (sync invoke)

**Tollara:** caller / buyer automation

Calls **backend-url-metadata-sync** via gateway.

**Before run:** edit **Set Config** — `serviceKey`, `serviceId`, `endpointId` from your Tollara listing.

**Credential:** Tollara Subscriber API (Gateway `http://host.docker.internal:8083`)

**Requires:** backend workflow active + listing `realUrl` → n8n webhook.
